name: Fudge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, mix 5 tbsp cocoa and 5 tbsp milk, bringing to a boil while stirring constantly, then remove from heat and let cool.
2. Cream butter and sugar together, add beaten eggs.
3. Add the 1/4 cup milk and 1/4 cup flour to the mixture.
4. Incorporate the cocoa mixture, followed by additional flour, baking powder, and salt. Add vanilla.
5. Pour batter into greased and floured 9-inch layer cake pans.
6. Bake in a 350°F oven for 30-35 minutes.
7. Filling: In a bowl, combine 1/2 cup white sugar, 1 1/2 tbsp cocoa, 1 tbsp flour, 1 cup hot water, and 1 tbsp butter. Cook until thick and cool.
8. Cut each cake layer in half and place them back together with filling between layers.
9. On top, sprinkle icing sugar.
